title: Screening of core targets for Di(2-ethylhexyl) Phthalate-related gastric cancer based on machine learning, molecular docking, and SHAP analysis.
snippet: Given the existing uncertainties regarding the link between Di(2-ethylhexyl) phthalate (DEHP) exposure and gastric cancer (GC) progression, this study aimed to clarify their association, identify the toxic targets of DEHP, and elucidate the underlying molecular mechanisms. Multiple integrated approaches were employed, including Gene Expression Omnibus (GEO)...

title: Integrative Genomic Mapping and Visualization From Curated Public Datasets Reveals Germline RB1 Variant Diversity in Retinoblastoma.
snippet: To consolidate and refine RB1 disease-causing variants in retinoblastoma (RB) and to develop a visual, integrative tool for variant exploration at the gene and protein level. RB1 variants associated with RB were compiled from the Leiden Open Variation Database, 13 published cohort studies between 2014 and 2025, and the Catalogue of Somatic Mutations in Canc...

title: Genomic Classification to Predict Survival in Metastatic Prostate Cancer: Development of Somatic Tumor Risk Assessment for Overall Survival-Prostate.
snippet: Tumor comprehensive genomic profiling (CGP) has revolutionized cancer care and identifies patients for biomarker-specific therapy. In metastatic hormone-sensitive prostate cancer (mHSPC), although individual genes are prognostic, no comprehensive genomic classification exists using CGP that accounts for combinations of alterations to inform prognosis. title: [To explore the immune landscape of lung adenocarcinoma patients with draining lymph nodes based on single cell sequencing].

snippet: Objective To explore the immune landscape of patients with lung adenocarcinoma with drainage lymph nodes by single-cell sequencing technology. title: [Cinobufagin inhibits CD244macrophages to enhance T-cell activity and chemosensitivity in colorectal cancer].
